MirrorUnavailableBody: Windows refused Export-StartLayout on this build. MenYou will keep the last known pins.
ReplaceStart: Replace Start: capture taskbar Start click + Shift+Win shortcut
ReplaceStartDescription: Lone Win key still opens the system menu (Microsoft moved its detector behind DirectComposition on Win 11 24H2 — Open-Shell hit the same wall and recommends Shift+Win).
HideOnFocusLost: Hide menu when it loses focus
MirrorWinStartDescription: When on, MenYou's Pinned section reflects the live Windows 11 Start menu pin list (via Export-StartLayout + a file-watcher on start2.bin). Manual Pin/Unpin inside MenYou is disabled — the system Start is the source of truth.
PushToWinStartDescription: Writes MenYou's pin list to the ConfigureStartPins policy and restarts Explorer. One-shot — Windows applies pins on next sign-in. The user can edit Start pins after; re-run this to push again.
UpdateDownloaded: Update ready — restart MenYou to apply
StyleWin7Desc: Two columns, pinned tiles, inline programs tree
StyleClassic2Desc: Pinned + cascading All Programs, right-side shell links
StyleClassic1Desc: Compact list with cascading Programs submenu
StyleWindows11Desc: Search on top, tile grid, account and power on the bottom bar
StyleMintCinnamonDesc: Dark sidebar with pinned and places, programs in the content pane
ConfirmEmptyThemeBody: "Use custom theme" is on but the editor is empty, so the menu will appear blank. Apply anyway?
UseDiscoveryCacheDescription: Paint the menu instantly from a saved snapshot on a cold start, then refresh in the background. A fast file check makes sure a changed app list is never shown stale.
ImmediateRevealDescription: Show the menu the instant you open it and fill in tiles as apps are found, instead of waiting for the scan to finish. Only affects a cold start — with the cache warm the menu is already populated.
DiagnosticLoggingDescription: Write a diagnostic trace to %TEMP%\menyou-hooks.log for troubleshooting startup and hooks. Off by default; the log is cleared on startup once it grows past the size below.
